report.summary: First cycle of Day 2 (Mar 28). BTC $66,008–$66,350 (flat overnight, testing $66K support). ETH $1,976–$2,008 (sub-$2K persists). F&G 12 (Extreme Fear — 49+ day streak, new cycle low). SEC March 27 ETF ruling results still unclear — no confirmed mass approvals/rejections in available sources; XRP spot ETFs already trading with $1.44B inflows, SOL staking ETFs live. ETF outflows $296M weekly ($171M on Mar 27 alone). 257 uncommitted files (↑7 from yesterday's 250). Zero cycles ran today yet — fresh sprint start. Deploy remains P0 for 10th consecutive cycle.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,008–$66,350. Down 2.08–2.28% in 24h. Testing critical $66K support. 28% below 200-day SMA. 48% below Oct 2025 peak. YTD decline 24.6%. Iran/geopolitical tensions remain primary macro headwind.
ETH: $1,976–$2,008. Day range $1,983–$2,008. Sub-$2K for 3rd+ consecutive day. Previous close $2,040 (down ~3%). 12-month change +9.28% (lagging BTC).

F&G INDEX: 12 (Extreme Fear). Dropped from 13 yesterday. 49+ consecutive days in Extreme Fear — longest streak since post-FTX Oct 2022. Dipped to 8 on Mar 24 (cycle low). Historically, sustained sub-15 readings precede 30-90 day reversals with median +38.4% BTC return.

ETF FLOWS: Spot BTC ETFs broke 4-week inflow streak. $296M weekly outflows. Mar 27 alone: -$171M (largest daily redemption in 3+ weeks). Broad institutional risk-off — capital 'avoiding directional risk' per analysts. Clearest institutional bearish signal since Iran tensions began.

SEC ETF RULING (Mar 27 deadline): Results still emerging. 91 applications across 24 tokens had final deadline. XRP spot ETFs already live and trading ($1.44B cumulative inflows). SOL/LTC staking ETFs trading (VanEck VSOL, Bitwise BSOL). Mar 17 commodity classification for 16 tokens removed key legal barriers. Remaining applications likely mix of approvals, extensions, and a few rejections — full outcome not yet confirmed in available sources.

DELTA FROM YESTERDAY (v9): BTC stable ($66.6K→$66.2K, -0.6%). ETH stable ($1,989→$1,997, flat). F&G dropped 13→12. Uncommitted files 250→257 (↑7 — new content built overnight by no agents, likely from prior working tree state). No new agent cycles ran between yesterday's v9 and this standup.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: FIRST CYCLE OF MARCH 28. All counters reset. Yesterday completed 9 full rotations across 47 agent runs (9 standup + 8 build + 5 publish + 8 design + 8 community + 9 eod). Total yesterday: ~$3,795 human-equivalent.
CARRY-OVER FROM YESTERDAY: 257 uncommitted files (226 untracked + 31 modified). Includes 30+ learn pages, 62+ OG images, promoted pages, UX fixes, community assets. ALL invisible to production.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) Deploy — 257 uncommitted files, 10th cycle flagging this as P0. (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked — wallet security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx. (3) 0/6 public API routes rate-limited. (4) 142 TS errors in 5 files (stable, non-blocking). (5) 105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx.

WHAT WAS BUILT YESTERDAY: 2 new learn pages (DeFi Lending Comparison, Yield Aggregators), 14 UX/bug fixes (including critical SSR 'use client' fix), 2 pages promoted to publish (shared sequencing, wrapped BTC), 3 tweets (#208-210), 1 SVG social card, newsletter v33 addendum. Total published: ~881 entries.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages). No new commits since. 31 modified files + 226 untracked. All changes are additive — no regressions.

ACTION ITEMS THIS SPRINT: (1) Commit + deploy all staged work. (2) Fix 2 blocked queue items. (3) Build SEC ruling reactive content once results confirmed. (4) Continue learn page pipeline. (5) Rate limiter integration for API routes.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 10th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 257 uncommitted files. This is now a 2-day-old backlog. Every asset from yesterday's 47 agent runs — 18+ learn pages, 62+ OG images, promoted pages, UX fixes, community assets — invisible to Google and users. One git commit + Vercel push unlocks everything. Jefe: this remains the single highest-leverage action.

PRIORITY 2 — SEC RULING CONTENT: March 27 was the biggest ETF decision day in crypto history. Results are emerging. Once confirmed, immediately build reactive content: 'SEC March 27 ETF Ruling: Full Breakdown', 'Which Crypto ETFs Got Approved/Extended', 'What SOL/LTC/DOGE ETF Decisions Mean'. The 24-48 hour post-announcement window is peak search intent — we are within it NOW.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR CONTENT PLAY: F&G at 12 (49+ day streak). BTC at $66K. ETH sub-$2K. Institutional outflows accelerating. This is exactly the environment where 'what to do during a crypto crash' and 'fear & greed index explained' content gets massive search volume. Our existing tools + new guides should be promoted and optimized for these queries.
